summary: Full e2e testing of AI Studio Click Massa - all 14 features tested. Backend: 15/15 tests pass. Frontend: all core flows verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Response returns user fields directly (id, email, role, token) - not nested under 'user' key. Documentation says {token, user} but actual response is flat object. Not a bug per se but inconsistent with stated contract.

integration_issues.issue: No toast/snackbar notification shown after clicking 'Testar Conexão'. The 'Testado em' timestamp does update but there is no visual feedback toast for the user.

issues: Mind map canvas is blank/empty by default - no initial node shown. User must click 'Novo Mapa' to start. UX could benefit from an initial empty state with guidance.

action_items: Optional: Add toast notification after 'Testar Conexão' returns success (visual feedback improvement)
Optional: Add empty-state guidance in Mind Map canvas before creating first map
critical_code_review_comments: CORS in server.py only allows FRONTEND_URL, localhost:3000, localhost:3001 - the production preview URL is not in the allow_origins list. This likely works because FRONTEND_URL env var is set correctly, but verify FRONTEND_URL=https://ai-studio-builder-3.preview.emergentagent.com is set in backend .env
Template clone endpoint is /clone not /use - frontend Templates page uses 'Usar este template' button which maps to /clone. This is working correctly.
Login API returns flat user object (not nested under 'user' key) - AuthContext.js should handle this correctly since it uses the direct response.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Agent x2 and TEST_user via register. Also cloned a template.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend API tests pass. All frontend pages load correctly. Flows tested: login->dashboard, agents list/create, templates list/use-template->builder redirect, skills 8 native with category filter, integrations Click Massa connected + test connection, mind map page, executions history, logout->login. Minor: no toast on Testar Conexão. Register tested via API (201 OK). Template endpoint is /clone not /use.
